errors.gitNotInstalled: Git is not installed. Please install Git first.
errors.targetDirectoryNotEmpty: Target directory already exists and is not empty.
errors.repositoryNotFound: Repository not found. Check URL and access permissions.
errors.networkUnavailable: Network is unavailable. Check your connection and try again.
errors.authenticationFailed: Authentication failed. Check credentials or SSH key.

GitCredentialDialog.title: Authentication Required
GitCredentialDialog.description: The remote server requires credentials. Enter your username and password (or personal access token).
GitCredentialDialog.passwordHint: For non-GitHub servers, enter your username and password.
GitCredentialDialog.githubDescription: Enter a personal access token to authenticate with GitHub. The token will be validated and saved to your accounts.
GitCredentialDialog.githubTokenHint: Generate a token at GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens.

AppearanceSettings.sectionDescription: Choose light, dark, or follow system. Settings are saved automatically.

themeColor.sectionDescription: Pick a color palette for accents, buttons, and highlights.

zoomLevel.sectionDescription: Scale the entire interface. Applies immediately and persists per device.

AppearanceSettings.resetHint: Reset theme color and window zoom to defaults.

SystemSettings.sectionDescription: Manage network proxy, app updates and language preferences.
SystemSettings.proxyDescription: When enabled, subsequent network requests prefer this proxy (including ACP chat, agent installation and Git remote operations).
SystemSettings.proxyHint: Supports http(s)/socks5, example: {example}. Only effective when system proxy is enabled.
SystemSettings.proxyRequired: Proxy URL is required when proxy is enabled
SystemSettings.languageDescription: Set app language. When following system locale, unsupported languages fall back to English.
SystemSettings.updateDescription: Check the configured release source for newer versions and install directly when available.

updateErrors.sourceUnavailable: Cannot reach the update source. Check your network or proxy and try again.
updateErrors.network: Network connection failed. Check your network or proxy and try again.
updateErrors.downloadFailed: Failed to download update package. Please try again later.
updateErrors.installFailed: Failed to install update. Please close the app and try again.
updateErrors.unknown: Update failed. Please try again later.

VersionControlSettings.sectionDescription: Configure Git executable and manage GitHub accounts.
VersionControlSettings.gitDescription: Configure the Git executable used by the application.
VersionControlSettings.gitNotFound: Git not found on this system
VersionControlSettings.customGitPathHint: Leave empty to use the auto-detected path.
VersionControlSettings.githubDescription: Manage GitHub accounts for authentication. Tokens are stored locally.
VersionControlSettings.tokenHint: Generate a token at GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens.
VersionControlSettings.removeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove the account "{username}"?

gitAccount.sectionDescription: Manage credentials for non-GitHub Git servers (GitLab, Bitbucket, self-hosted, etc.).
gitAccount.addDescription: Enter the server address, username, and password or access token.
gitAccount.passwordHint: Enter your password or a personal access token for the server.

ShortcutSettings.recordInstruction: Click the right-side button, then press a key combination. Use Ctrl/Cmd, Alt, and Shift. Press Esc to cancel recording.

toggle_search.title: Open Search
toggle_search.description: Show or hide the conversation search panel

toggle_sidebar.title: Toggle Left Sidebar
toggle_sidebar.description: Show or hide the conversation list sidebar

toggle_terminal.title: Toggle Terminal
toggle_terminal.description: Show or hide the bottom terminal panel

new_terminal_tab.title: New Terminal
new_terminal_tab.description: Create a new terminal tab when focus is on terminal

close_current_terminal_tab.title: Close Current Terminal
close_current_terminal_tab.description: Close the current terminal tab when focus is on terminal

toggle_aux_panel.title: Toggle Right Panel
toggle_aux_panel.description: Show or hide the auxiliary info panel

new_conversation.title: New Conversation
new_conversation.description: Create a new conversation tab in current folder

open_folder.title: Open Folder
open_folder.description: Open folder picker and open in a new window

close_current_tab.title: Close Current Tab
close_current_tab.description: Close current conversation or file tab

close_all_file_tabs.title: Close All File Tabs
close_all_file_tabs.description: Close all file tabs in file mode only

send_message.title: Send Message
send_message.description: Send the current message in the input box

newline_in_message.title: Newline in Message
newline_in_message.description: Insert a newline in the message input box

SkillsSettings.title: Skills
SkillsSettings.description: Select a skill on the left. The right side previews Markdown by default; switch to edit to modify and save.
SkillsSettings.emptyNoManageableAgents: No agents available for Skills management.
SkillsSettings.agentNotSupported: Current agent does not support Skills management.
SkillsSettings.emptySkills: No skills yet. Click "New Skill" to create one.
SkillsSettings.skillsDirectoryNeedId: Skills directory: enter Skill ID to generate full path
SkillsSettings.onlyYamlMetadata: This skill only contains YAML metadata.
SkillsSettings.emptyContentHint: No content yet. Click "Edit" to start.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Skill
deleteDialog.confirm: Delete current skill? This action cannot be undone.

toasts.noSkillDirectory: No available Skills directory found for current agent

templates.gemini:
---
name: example-skill
description: Describe when this skill should be used.
---

# Skill Name

Instructions for the agent when this skill is active.

## Workflow

1. Add actionable step one.
2. Add actionable step two.
templates.openCode:
---
name: example-skill
description: Describe when this skill should be used.
---

# Purpose

Describe what this skill helps with.

# Steps

1. Add actionable step one.
2. Add actionable step two.
templates.openClaw:
---
name: example-skill
description: Describe when this skill should be used.
user-invocable: true
disable-model-invocation: false
---

# Purpose

Describe what this skill helps with.

# Instructions

1. Add actionable instruction one.
2. Add actionable instruction two.
templates.default:
# Skill: example-skill

## When to use

- Describe trigger conditions.

## Instructions

1. Add actionable instruction one.
2. Add actionable instruction two.

errors.fieldOutOfRange: {field} value is out of allowed range

toasts.selectAtLeastOneApp: Please select at least one target app

local.description: Local MCP configuration can be edited and saved directly.

market.installConfigDescription: Install Config (JSON, editable before install; edits will override protocol/parameter form)
market.selectLeftToView: Select a marketplace MCP on the left to view details.

AcpAgentSettings.title: Agent SDK Management
AcpAgentSettings.description: Manage Agent SDK connection, enabled state, environment variables, config management and version preflight info in one place.
AcpAgentSettings.modelHintDefault: Leave empty to use system default model.
AcpAgentSettings.generalConfigDescriptionClaude: Supports quick configuration for API URL, API Key and Claude models, and syncs with native JSON config.
AcpAgentSettings.generalConfigDescriptionDefault: Supports important config input (API URL, API Key, Model) and native JSON config management.

codex.configDescription: Supports quick configuration for API URL, API Key, model name and reasoning effort, and syncs with `auth.json` / `config.toml`.
codex.chatgptSubscriptionHint: Log in with ChatGPT official subscription, no API Key required
codex.apiKeyHint: Connect using API Key to OpenAI or compatible API services

gemini.authConfigDescription: Aligned with Gemini CLI authentication docs, supporting custom endpoint, Google login, Gemini API Key and Vertex AI (ADC / service account / API Key).

hint.custom: Fill API URL, API Key and Model, mapped to GOOGLE_GEMINI_BASE_URL / GEMINI_API_KEY / GEMINI_MODEL.
hint.loginGoogle: Run gemini in terminal and complete Google login first; API key is not required.
hint.geminiApiKey: Fill GEMINI_API_KEY when using Gemini API.
hint.vertexAdc: Use gcloud ADC; GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT and GOOGLE_CLOUD_LOCATION are recommended.
hint.vertexServiceAccount: Set service account JSON path to GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS.
hint.vertexApiKey: Fill GOOGLE_API_KEY when using Vertex AI API key.

openCode.configDescription: Aligned with OpenCode `provider` schema, supports multi-provider management and two-way sync with native JSON files.
openCode.emptyProvider: No provider yet. Enter an ID then click "Add Provider".
openCode.modelDescription: Aligned with OpenCode `provider.models`. Fast management currently supports `name` / `id`; other advanced fields are preserved and can be edited in native JSON below.
openCode.emptyModel: No model yet. Enter model id then click "Add model".

openClaw.gatewayDescription: Configure OpenClaw Gateway connection. Supports local or remote gateway.
openClaw.gatewayUrlHint: Leave empty to use gateway.remote.url from local openclaw config.
openClaw.gatewayTokenHint: Use token-file instead of plain token when possible; configure via openclaw CLI.
openClaw.sessionKeyHint: Optional. Specify gateway session key; leave empty to auto-assign isolated session.

AcpAgentSettings.authModeCustomEndpointHint: Manually configure API URL and API Key for a custom endpoint.
AcpAgentSettings.modelProviderHint: Use API URL and API Key from a configured model provider.
AcpAgentSettings.noModelProviderAvailable: No model provider configured for this agent. Go to Model Provider Settings to add one.

claude.officialSubscriptionHint: Use official Anthropic subscription, no API Key required.
